name: PlantFuel Life Inc.
summary: Sire Bioscience Inc., together with its subsidiaries, invests in, cultivates, produces, and sells various hemp and cannabis products in Canada. It offers cannabidiol (CBD) based wellness products, oils, and edibles, as well as animal and pet related CBD products under the yumz, MEDIflower, BIONIC,FUSIONS, PURPLEK, INFUSIONS, Voila, Karma, CANNA BANANA, cancan, FUR BABY, CBDTECH, and LEAFBELIEF. The company is headquartered in Mississauga, Canada.
